name: trustgraph-mcp
description: Trust + reputation lookups for URLs, MCP servers, and tools, backed by the TrustGraph API.
long_description:
Exposes 10 tools (score, profile, retrieve, rank, capabilities, discover, score_batch, score_history, rate, get_rubric) plus a selectable proactive-trust-check prompt over the TrustGraph reputation API. Use the read tools to check the trust of a source before consuming it, and `rate` to submit ratings after — feeding the community's accumulated signal.

Write endpoints auto-mint an API key on first use (stored locally at mode 0600, URL-scoped to the deployment). Read endpoints are unauthenticated.

The paired `trustgraph-proactive` prompt — selectable from Desktop's `/` command picker — pins the auto-firing protocol for one conversation. For always-on firing, paste the equivalent text into Claude Desktop's Profile preferences (see docs/desktop-personalize.md in the repo).

tools.name: score
tools.description: Trust pre-check for one URL or MCP capability (composite + confidence + diagnostics)

tools.name: profile
tools.description: Full snapshot of one entity — dimensions + top failure modes + top capability tags + LLM-generated summary

tools.name: retrieve
tools.description: Past rating events for one entity, optionally ranked by similarity to a query

tools.name: rank
tools.description: Cross-entity ranking on a chosen dimension within a known capability tag

tools.name: capabilities
tools.description: List capability tags rated across the corpus

tools.name: discover
tools.description: Free-text task description → ranked entities (searches the TrustGraph rating corpus, not the host's available tools)

tools.name: score_batch
tools.description: Batch trust lookup for up to 100 entity refs in one call

tools.name: score_history
tools.description: Time-bucketed score trend for one entity — the "is X getting worse?" lens

tools.name: rate
tools.description: Submit a rating after consuming/invoking (auto-mints + caches the API key on first call)

tools.name: get_rubric
tools.description: Full scoring rubric: anchors, dimensions with inversion notes, weight semantics, examples

prompts.name: trustgraph-proactive
prompts.description: Pin at conversation start to fire score before / rate after non-trivial fetches/tool-calls — the closest analog to the Code skill's PostToolUse hooks inside Desktop's UX.

trustgraph_base_url.title: TrustGraph deployment URL
trustgraph_base_url.description: Base URL of the TrustGraph API. ⚠️ The default is an AWS App Runner subdomain on a shared zone — for any non-experimental use, point this at your own deployment to avoid DNS-takeover risk on the shared host.

debug_log_path.title: Debug log path (optional)
debug_log_path.description: If set, every request/response is appended here as JSONL (mode 0600). Useful when diagnosing why a tool call didn't behave. Leave empty to disable.
